subject: FW: GSJ
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com] 
Sent: Monday, November 26, 2007 4:12 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: GSJ



Please convey to JE that this is the text of the letter we intend to
send to Kevin D'Amour:

Dear Mr. D'Amour,

                                We have not spoken in some time, but I
know that you have continued to market this island for sale.  As you
know, Island Global Yachting has a vested interest in the maintenance of
private, yachting oriented destinations world-wide.   The anchorages of
Great St. james are amongst the most beautiful in the USVI and IGY wants
to find a way to preserve same for the pleasure of its clients.  As a
result, we are prepared to offer to purchase the island for $8mm, all
cash, and to close as soon as possible.  Our plan would be not to
develop the island; to the contrary we would preserve its pristine state
and undertake to establish it as a permenant boating and eco-tourism
preserve.   We believe that this alone would have significant value to
the IGY franchise and to our constituencies.  Thank you for your
consideration.  

Let me know if JE has any advice or comments.

________________________________

 
The information contained in this message and any attachment to it may
be privileged, confidential or otherwise protected from disclosure. If
you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any
dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly
prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please
notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please
delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions
presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not
necessarily represent those of the company.
body_html:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

From: Farkas, Andrew L. [mailto:afarkas@islecap.com]
Sent: Monday, November 26, 2007 4:12 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: GSJ

Please convey to JE that this is the text of the letter we intend to send to Kevin D'Amour:

Dear Mr. D'Amour,

                                We have not spoken in some time, but I know that you have continued to market this island for sale.  As you know, Island Global Yachting has a vested interest in the maintenance of private, yachting oriented destinations world-wide.   The anchorages of Great St. james are amongst the most beautiful in the USVI and IGY wants to find a way to preserve same for the pleasure of its clients.  As a result, we are prepared to offer to purchase the island for $8mm, all cash, and to close as soon as possible.  Our plan would be not to develop the island; to the contrary we would preserve its pristine state and undertake to establish it as a permenant boating and eco-tourism preserve.   We believe that this alone would have significant value to the IGY franchise and to our constituencies.  Thank you for your consideration. 

Let me know if JE has any advice or comments.

If you are not the intended recipient, you are hereby notified that any dissemination, distribution or copying of this communication is strictly prohibited. If you have received this communication in error, please notify the sender immediately by replying to the message and please delete it from your system. Please also note that any views or opinions presented in this email are solely those of the author and do not necessarily represent those of the company.
